surface_verification.justification: Lockfile-only dependency bump (no package.json/source/API/contract/UI change); all flagged packages are dev/build/test-only tooling. Verified by the full unit suite (3500 green), typecheck, lint, and clean builds (incl. the vite 6.4.3 client bundle) plus npm audit 0/0 in both workspaces.

behaviors.behavior: Both npm workspaces report zero open advisories (npm audit) at all severities after the bumps (baseline: server 1 low, client 6).
behaviors.evidence: npm audit --json -> metadata.vulnerabilities total=0 for server and client (post-fix)

behaviors.behavior: No regression in server build/test/type behavior after the tsx minor bump pulling the fixed transitive esbuild.
behaviors.evidence: server vitest 1688/1688 passed (138 files); tsc --noEmit, oxlint, npm run build all PASS

behaviors.behavior: No regression in client build/test/type behavior after the vite patch (6.4.2->6.4.3) + tsx bump.
behaviors.evidence: client vitest 1812/1812 passed (184 files); tsc, oxlint, vite build (built in 15.3s) all PASS
